scripts.build: npm run build -w protocol && npm run build -w @astralops/transcript && npm run build -w @astralops/workbench-state && npm run build -w @astralops/i18n && npm run build -w @astralops/controller-client && npm run build -w apps/desktop && npm run build -w apps/mobile && go build ./daemon ./proxy-agent ./relay
scripts.check: npm run check -w protocol && npm run check -w @astralops/transcript && npm run check -w @astralops/workbench-state && npm run check -w @astralops/i18n && npm run check -w @astralops/controller-client && npm run check -w apps/desktop && npm run check -w apps/mobile && go test ./...
